# https://t-atlas.github.io/ llms-full.txt

## Researcher Profile

Junhong Lian is a researcher working on natural language processing, personalized generation in large language models, and AI for research.

## Main Pages

- [English Home](https://t-atlas.github.io/)
- [中文主页](https://t-atlas.github.io/zh/)
- [Publications](https://t-atlas.github.io/publications/)
- [预印本 / Preprints](https://t-atlas.github.io/publications/#preprints)
- [News](https://t-atlas.github.io/news/)
- [Blog Posts](https://t-atlas.github.io/year-archive/)
- [中文博客](https://t-atlas.github.io/zh/year-archive/)
- [CV](https://t-atlas.github.io/cv/)

## Blog Posts

### [My First Blog Post](https://t-atlas.github.io/posts/2025/03/first-blog-post/)

Published: March 12, 2025

Welcome to my first blog post. I will share what I see, learn, and think about here.

### [我的第一篇博客](https://t-atlas.github.io/zh/posts/2025/03/first-blog-post/)

发布时间：2025年3月12日

欢迎来到我的第一篇博客，我在这里分享我的见闻和思考。

## Publications

### [Towards AI for AI Research: A Survey](https://t-atlas.github.io/publication/2026-06-01-ai4air-survey)

Preprint, 2026.

Authors include Junhong Lian, Xiaoyu Zhang, Jiaqi Zhang, Tingwen Liu, Kaile Wang, Yang Zhao, Peiwen Yuan, Zhenyu Guo, Yisong Huang, Qin Jin, Qun Liu, Zhiting Hu, Xiang Ao, and Xueqi Cheng. Xiang Ao and Xueqi Cheng are corresponding authors.

### [Improved Personalized News Headline Generation via Causal Modeling of Content and Style](https://t-atlas.github.io/publication/2025-08-09-improved-personalized)

CIKM 2025.

Downloads: [Paper](https://t-atlas.github.io/files/CIKM2025_paper.pdf), [Slides](https://t-atlas.github.io/files/CIKM2025_slides.pdf), [Poster](https://t-atlas.github.io/files/CIKM2025_poster.pdf).

### [Panoramic Interests: Stylistic-Content Aware Personalized Headline Generation](https://t-atlas.github.io/publication/2025-04-28-panoramic-interests)

WWW 2025.

Downloads: [Paper](https://t-atlas.github.io/files/WWW2025_paper.pdf), [Slides](https://t-atlas.github.io/files/WWW2025_slides.pdf), [Poster](https://t-atlas.github.io/files/WWW2025_poster.pdf).

### [Fact-Preserved Personalized News Headline Generation](https://t-atlas.github.io/publication/2023-12-01-fact-preserved)

ICDM 2023.

Downloads: [Paper](https://t-atlas.github.io/files/ICDM2023_paper.pdf), [Slides](https://t-atlas.github.io/files/ICDM2023_slides.pdf).
